attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WFA.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM,
 WFA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
 WFA.BK_COMPANY_CD,
 WFA.SERIAL_NUM,
 WFA.RU_OWNER_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
 WFA.FA_TAG_NUM,
 WFA.MODEL_NUM,
 WFA.ASSET_DESCR,
 WFA.ASSET_ACQUISITION_DT,
 WFA.INTERNAL_EQUIPMENT_ROLE,
 WFA.OWNER_ROLE,
 WFA.DEPRECIATION_METHOD_CD,
 WFA.ASST_DEPRECIABLE_LIFE_MTHS_CNT,
 WFA.ASSET_DEPRECIATION_START_DT,
 WFA.ASSET_PLACED_IN_SERVICE_DT,
 WFA.ORIGINAL_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
 WFA.ORIGINAL_COST_USD_AMT,
 WFA.CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
 WFA.CURRENT_COST_USD_AMT,
 WFA.REMAINING_LIFE_MONTHS_CNT,
 WFA.NET_DEPRECIATION_AMT,
 WFA.SS_CD,
 WFA.SK_ASSET_ID_INT,
 WFA.BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD,
 WFA.BK_ASSET_SUBCATEGORY_CD,
 WFA.BK_ASSET_CATEGORY_CD,
 WFA.ASSET_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 WFA.CIP_TARGET_ASSET_GL_ACCT_KEY,
 WFA.EXPENSE_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 WFA.BK_FIXED_ASSET_TYPE_CD,
 WFA.RU_INTERNAL_EQPMNT_ASSET_QTY,
 WFA.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 WFA.EDW_CREATE_USER,
 WFA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 WFA.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 WFA.FIXED_ASSET_EFFECTIVE_DTM,
 WFA.FIXED_ASSET_INEFFECTIVE_DTM,
WFA.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 WFA.RU_BK_DEAL_ID ,
WFA.RU_ON_PREMISE_FLG ,
WFA.RU_REVENUE_PROGRAM_NAME
FROM
$$WORKDB.W_FIXED_ASSET WFA
WHERE NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET NFA
WHERE NFA.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM = WFA.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM AND
NFA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY =WFA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND
NFA.BK_COMPANY_CD =WFA.BK_COMPANY_CD)
